name: Symin (multiple scenarios)
description:
🧪 Welcome to the chaotic world of Symin — the eccentric Sheikah scientist from Hateno Village, now reimagined as a “Make Your Own Story” bot. Designed for dynamic roleplay and storytelling, this bot lets you create your own custom scenarios, characters, and goals — all within the explosive, unpredictable setting of the Ancient Tech Lab.

Will you be a wandering hero? A rival inventor? A clueless traveler who just stepped into a time loop generator? That’s entirely up to you.

⚠️ Note: This bot was created as a personal request for a friend. It’s a standalone experience, and not part of a larger series or collection. Additional features, scenarios, or expansions will only be added based on that friend’s input — not by general request.

This is a contained project meant to serve a specific vision. Enjoy the chaos 😉

Scene 1: make your own scenario
creator: Tatsuo06
